description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wardrobe with a modern, minimalist design. The front features three vertical doors, with the central door incorporating a large rectangular mirror panel. The exterior is finished in a light gray wood grain texture, giving it a contemporary and neutral appearance suitable for urban interiors. The side panels are plain, showcasing the same wood grain finish as the front. Small, round knobs serve as handles for the doors, and subtle panel lines add a touch of detail to the otherwise smooth surfaces. The top and base are slightly extended, providing a framed look to the overall structure.
description: A tall, light gray wood grain wardrobe with three doors, a central mirror, and round knobs, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The back of the wardrobe, plain and finished in a solid light gray color with no visible features.
description_view_1: A side view showing the depth and wood grain texture of the wardrobe, with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_2: The front view displaying three doors, a central mirror panel, and round knobs, with detailed panel lines and a wood grain finish.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain texture and the depth of the wardrobe.
